name: Unrequited
overview: A dramedy series about Liam, an introvert at a crossroads in life. In therapy, at a dead-end job, and single. Or is he? The series follows Liam's therapy journey and secret crush with the "barista next door" that starts blurring the lines between reality and fantasy.

trailers.title: Unrequited | Brand New LGBTQ Dramedy Series | Official Trailer 2026
